ham.subject: Reminder: CRM Software License Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a friendly reminder that the license for our Salesforce Enterprise Edition will expire on 15th March 2026. Please review and renew your access via the internal Licensing portal by 10th March to ensure uninterrupted service.

If you have already completed the renewal, you can ignore this notice. For any questions, contact the IT Licensing Support team.

Thanks,
John D. Smith
IT Licensing Coordinator

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Software License Expired – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Our records indicate that your Salesforce Enterprise Edition license has been suspended due to non‑payment. Failure to reactivate your license within 24 hours will result in permanent account lock and loss of all customer data.

To restore your access and avoid data loss, please log in to your account and complete the payment immediately:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention. – Salesforce Licensing Administration
